package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_panic_recover_for_control_flow: Layer: Error handling cost. Flag panic/recover used for expected branch control in performance-sensitive code.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule532PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario532Positive(records []Rule532PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
